sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂפק ספק

Transliteration: sâphaq śâphaq

Phonetic: saw-fak'

BDB Definition:

(1Ki 20:10, Job 27:23, Is Job 2:6)
  1. to clap, slap
    1. (Qal)
      1. to slap, clap
      2. to slap, chastise
      3. to splash, throw up
    2. (Hiphil) to cause to clap

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1539

Part(s) of speech: Verb
